test_cases.description: Verifies the skill structures an optimal prompt for Stitch hero section generation
test_cases.input: I want to generate a SaaS hero section with Stitch. How should I write the prompt?

test_cases.description: Verifies correct CSS-to-Tailwind mapping for common properties from Stitch output
test_cases.input: Stitch gave me CSS: padding: 24px; font-size: 20px; border-radius: 8px; gap: 16px. Map these to Tailwind.

test_cases.description: Verifies correct mapping of Stitch HTML elements to shadcn/ui components
test_cases.input: Stitch generated a form with a text input, a select dropdown, and a primary submit button. Map these to shadcn components.
